name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A little something from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We saw you cancelled — no hard feelings, life gets busy and dental care shouldn't add stress. If you ever feel like coming back, here's 20% off your next visit on us:

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days, and you can use it on a cleaning or any visit you book.

If something about your last experience didn't sit right, I'd genuinely love to hear it — just hit reply. No sales pitch, I promise.

Take care either way,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a gentle heads up that your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in about a week. Use it whenever suits you, no pressure!

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
